items.content_html:
2026 IEEE International Conference on Data and Software Engineering (ICoDSE) 

“Generative AI Meets Data and Software Engineering: Challenges and Innovations”

Date
October 28-29, 2025

Venue
Technopark Politeknik Negeri Batam (hybrid online + offline)

Program Schedule

Time in the program schedule is in Western Indonesia Time / Waktu Indonesia Barat (WIB; GMT+7). Please pay attention and adjust it to your local time. Current time in WIB can be found on time.is/Batam.

items.title: 2025 ICoDSE Workshop
items.summary: As part of the 2025 IEEE International Conference on Data and Software Engineering (ICoDSE), we proudly present a hands-on workshop titled “Practical LLMs: Utilizing Language Models for Industry Challenges.” This two-day workshop will take place on September 20–21, 2025 at Technopark, Politeknik Negeri Batam, featuring…
items.content_html:
As part of the 2025 IEEE International Conference on Data and Software Engineering (ICoDSE), we proudly present a hands-on workshop titled
“Practical LLMs: Utilizing Language Models for Industry Challenges.”
This two-day workshop will take place on September 20–21, 2025 at Technopark, Politeknik Negeri Batam, featuring expert mentors:

  • Hari Bagus Firdaus (Radya Labs)
  • Agung Dewandaru (STEI ITB)
  • Vaibhav Tupe (Equinix)

Participants will gain insights into the fundamentals and advanced prompting of LLMs, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), as well as hands-on sessions with local LLMs and multimodal integrations using n8n.

This workshop offers valuable benefits including guidance from experienced AI practitioners, an official certificate from STEI ITB, networking and collaboration opportunities, live demos, hands-on project templates, and real-world case studies on corporate document RAG. Registration is now open with a special early-bird price for the first 10 participants. Secure your spot today through the following registration link: https://forms.gle/ahadAeKKZpGzto4W8.

items.title: Venue
items.summary: Technopark Politeknik Negeri Batam (Polibatam) Technopark Polibatam is an innovation and technology development hub located in the strategic area of Batam, Riau Islands. Established to foster collaboration between industry, academia, and government, Technopark Polibatam offers modern facilities such as conference halls, technology laboratories, coworking spaces,…
items.content_html:
Technopark Politeknik Negeri Batam (Polibatam)

Technopark Polibatam is an innovation and technology development hub located in the strategic area of Batam, Riau Islands. Established to foster collaboration between industry, academia, and government, Technopark Polibatam offers modern facilities such as conference halls, technology laboratories, coworking spaces, and product innovation exhibition areas. Designed to inspire creativity and collaboration, it serves as an ideal ecosystem for research activities, product development, and knowledge exchange across various fields, including data science and software engineering. Its close proximity to Batam’s industrial zone makes Technopark a vital bridge between academic innovation and real-world business needs.

As the venue for ICoDSE 2025, Technopark Polibatam provides a professional and inspiring conference experience. With state-of-the-art infrastructure, high-speed internet connectivity, and a comfortable environment, it is well-suited for presentations, scientific discussions, and networking among international researchers. Attendees will also benefit from easy access to nearby hotels, culinary spots, and local attractions. Another key advantage is its location—just a short distance from Batam’s international ferry terminals and Hang Nadim Airport—making it convenient for both domestic and international participants, including those planning short trips to Singapore or Malaysia.

items.title: Call for Papers
items.summary: CALL FOR PAPERS 2025 IEEE International Conference on Data and Software Engineering (ICoDSE) 📅 October 28–29, 2025 | 📍 Batam, Indonesia (Hybrid) 🌐 https://icodse.org | 📩 icodse@informatika.org Dear Colleagues, We are delighted to invite you to the 2025 IEEE International Conference on Data and Software…
items.content_html:
CALL FOR PAPERS
2025 IEEE International Conference on Data and Software Engineering (ICoDSE)
📅 October 28–29, 2025 | 📍 Batam, Indonesia (Hybrid)
🌐 https://icodse.org | 📩 icodse@informatika.org

Dear Colleagues,

We are delighted to invite you to the 2025 IEEE International Conference on Data and Software Engineering (ICoDSE) — a prestigious, IEEE-indexed event that brings together global researchers, practitioners, and industry experts to discuss groundbreaking advances in software systems, data, and intelligent technologies.

Organized by:

  • School of Electrical Engineering and Informatics, Institut Teknologi Bandung (STEI ITB)
  • Politeknik Negeri Batam
  • Universiti Teknologi PETRONAS (UTP)

Also co-organized by:

  • Universitas Maritim Raja Ali Haji

Conference Theme:
“Generative AI Meets Data and Software Engineering: Challenges and Innovations”

This year’s edition focuses on the intersection between Generative AI and Software/Data Engineering, exploring how GenAI transforms development workflows and data pipelines, and how advancements in these fields drive the future of AI.

🎤 Keynote Speakers:

  • Assoc. Prof. Christoph Treude – SMU, Singapore
  • Univ. Prof. Marta Sabou, Ph.D. – WU, Austria
  • Assoc. Prof. Dr. Ir. G.A. Putri Saptawati, M.Comm. – ITB, Indonesia
  • Shrinath Thube – IBM Software Developer and IEEE Senior Member

Special Session by Dr. Ganesh Kumar: Generative AI for Education — Transforming Learning, Teaching, and Assessment
This special session will explore how Generative AI technologies are revolutionizing education from personalized learning and curriculum design to adaptive assessment, intelligent tutoring, and ethical considerations in AI-powered classrooms. Topics include AI assisted content creation, LLM based student support, learning analytics, educational chatbots, and ensuring data privacy and fairness in AI tools for education.

📆 Important Dates:

  • Paper Submission Deadline: Sep 5 September 19, 2025 extended!
  • Notification of Acceptance: Oct 4 October 11, 2025 extended!
  • Registration: October 4–21, 2025
  • Camera-Ready: October 21, 2025
  • Conference Dates: October 28–29, 2025

📄 Paper Submission:

  • Format: IEEE standard template (Word or LaTeX)
  • Submission Platform: To be announced on the website

All accepted and presented papers will be submitted to IEEE Xplore for publication and indexing.

💰 Registration Fee:

International Participants:

  • Presenter: USD 300
  • Presenter (IEEE Member): USD 250
  • Presenter (Student): USD 250
  • Presenter (Student – IEEE): USD 200
  • Non-Presenter / Attendee: USD 150

Domestic Participants:

  • Presenter: Rp 3.500.000,-
  • Presenter (IEEE Member): Rp 3.000.000,-
  • Presenter (Student): Rp 2.500.000,-
  • Presenter (Student – IEEE): Rp 2.100.000,-
  • Non-Presenter / Attendee: Rp 1.500.000,-

More information & submission guidelines:
🌐 https://icodse.org
📩 icodse@informatika.org

We look forward to receiving your contribution and welcoming you to Batam this October!

Warm regards,
2025 IEEE ICoDSE Organizing Committee

items.title: 2025 IEEE ICoDSE
items.summary: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Data and Software Engineering (ICoDSE) 📍 Technopark Politeknik Negeri Batam, (hybrid online + offline) Batam, Indonesia 📅 October 28-29, 2025 “Generative AI Meets Data and Software Engineering: Challenges and Innovations” IEEE International Conference on Data and Software Engineering (ICoDSE) is an…
items.content_html:
2025 IEEE International Conference on Data and Software Engineering (ICoDSE)

📍 Technopark Politeknik Negeri Batam, (hybrid online + offline)
Batam, Indonesia
📅 October 28-29, 2025

“Generative AI Meets Data and Software Engineering: Challenges and Innovations”

Important dates:

  • Paper Submission Deadline: Sep 5 September 19, 2025 extended!
  • Notification of Acceptance: Oct 4 October 11, 2025 extended!
  • Registration: Oct 4 - 14 October 4 - 21, 2025
  • Camera Ready Deadline: Oct 14 October 21, 2025
  • Conference Dates: October 28 - 29, 2025

IEEE International Conference on Data and Software Engineering (ICoDSE) is an annual event organized by the Knowledge and Software Engineering Research Group (KSE), School of Electrical Engineering and Informatics (STEI), ITB, since 2014. Several editions of ICoDSE have been conducted in collaboration with other universities in Indonesia. The year 2025 marks the 11th edition of ICoDSE, in collaboration with Politeknik Negeri Batam (Indonesia), Universiti Teknologi Petronas (Malaysia), and Universitas Maritim Raja Ali Haji (Indonesia).

Data/knowledge engineering and software engineering are two developing areas in information and communication technology, which are interrelated and have significant roles in changing the world in many aspects, such as business, education, government, and society. Although these disciplines are pretty mature, research and development in these disciplines are still evolving to provide better performance of offered services or products in different criteria, e.g., efficiency or effectiveness.

2025 IEEE ICoDSE will bring together scientists, educators, engineers, and practitioners from multiple disciplines to focus on engineering complex software system and data-intensive software systems. The conference will feature world-class keynotes and research & industry presentations to discuss high-quality research results and industry experiences in this field.

Selected paper title will be invited for submission in JICTRA with extended version of no less than 40% additional materials.

We are open to a wide range of topics related to data/knowledge engineering and software engineering, including (but are not limited to):

Software Engineering Track

  • Software Engineering Process & Lifecycle
  • Software Analysis and Design Methods
  • Business Process Management System
  • SOA (Service Oriented Architecture)
  • Empirical Software Engineering
  • Software Engineering Education
  • Software Project Management
  • Security Software and System
  • Software Quality Assurances
  • Software Engineering Tools
  • Requirements Engineering
  • Ultra Large-Scale System
  • Software Technologies
  • Software Product Line
  • Software Architecture
  • Open Source Software
  • Software Measurement
  • Extreme Programming
  • Agile Methodology
  • Software Industry
  • Cloud Computing

Very Relevant to the Theme:

  • Generative AI for Simulation and Virtual Environment
  • Machine Learning Operations
  • Model Deployment and Scaling
  • Generative AI for Code Generation
  • Multimodal AI Systems
  • Generative AI in NLP
  • Generative AI for Creative and Design Industries
  • Generative AI for Security and Fraud Detection
  • Digital Twins in Industrial and Enterprise Applications
  • XR/AR/VR Health Care and Medical Training
  • Innovations in Trraining and Educations using Mixed Reality

Data Engineering Track

  • Data and Knowledge Modeling
  • Information Management Practices
  • Knowledge-Based Management Systems
  • Data and Information Security
  • Spatial and Temporal Database
  • Knowledge Discovery in Data
  • Semantic Web Technology
  • Data Visualization & Analytic
  • Data/Process Mining
  • Business Intelligence
  • Distributed Database
  • Open Data
  • Big Data
  • Web Analytics
  • Ontology
  • Data Science
  • Database Technology

Very Relevant to the Theme:

  • Data-Centric AI Development
  • DataPrivacy and Ethical AI
  • Generative AI Infrastructure
  • AutoML for Generative Models
  • Generative AI for Anomaly
  • Detection and Predictive Modeling

Prospective authors are invited to submit full papers under the Submission Guidelines.

items.title: (2024) Venue
items.summary: Universitas Negeri Gorontalo (UNG) Universitas Negeri Gorontalo (UNG) is located in the heart of Gorontalo, Indonesia. Known for its commitment to excellence in education, UNG offers a wide range of undergraduate and graduate programs across various disciplines, including education, science, engineering, and social sciences. The…
items.content_html:
Universitas Negeri Gorontalo (UNG)

Universitas Negeri Gorontalo (UNG) is located in the heart of Gorontalo, Indonesia. Known for its commitment to excellence in education, UNG offers a wide range of undergraduate and graduate programs across various disciplines, including education, science, engineering, and social sciences. The university is dedicated to fostering a dynamic academic environment that encourages innovation, critical thinking, and community engagement.

Explore Gorontalo: The Hidden Gem of Indonesia

Gorontalo, located on the northern coast of Sulawesi, is a province renowned for its stunning natural landscapes, rich cultural heritage, and warm hospitality. This hidden gem of Indonesia offers a unique blend of unspoiled beaches, lush forests, and historical sites, making it a perfect destination for travelers seeking both relaxation and adventure.

The city of Gorontalo serves as the provincial capital and is the cultural and economic hub of the region. Visitors can explore the city's charming colonial architecture, vibrant markets, and local cuisine, which is influenced by the diverse ethnic groups that call Gorontalo home. Whether you're strolling through the streets of Gorontalo or venturing out into the countryside, you're sure to be captivated by the beauty and tranquility of this region.

Swim with Whale Sharks at Botubarani

One of the most extraordinary experiences that Gorontalo offers is the opportunity to swim with whale sharks at Botubarani. Located just a short drive from the city, Botubarani is a small coastal village that has gained international recognition as a prime spot for whale shark encounters. These gentle giants, the largest fish in the ocean, can be seen up close in the clear, warm waters of Botubarani.

The whale shark swimming tour in Botubarani is a once-in-a-lifetime experience. Visitors can snorkel or dive alongside these magnificent creatures, observing their graceful movements as they glide through the water. The tour is carefully managed to ensure the safety of both the sharks and the participants, making it a responsible and sustainable tourism activity.

The village of Botubarani has embraced its role as a guardian of these incredible animals, and the local community plays an active part in conservation efforts. By participating in this tour, visitors not only get to experience the awe-inspiring presence of whale sharks but also contribute to the preservation of marine life in Gorontalo.

items.title: Registration Page
items.summary: Registration Method Registration link will be provided in this page after acceptance notification date. Online registration for 2025 IEEE ICoDSE is now open. Please prepare your student ID (if applicable), presentation video & slide (for online presenter), and proof of payment before proceeding. Fill the…
items.content_html:
Registration Method

Online registration for 2025 IEEE ICoDSE is now open. Please prepare your student ID (if applicable), presentation video & slide (for online presenter), and proof of payment before proceeding. Fill the registration form here.

Registration Fee

International

Presenter USD 300
Presenter (IEEE) USD 250
Presenter (Student) USD 250
Presenter (Student - IEEE) USD 200
Non Presenter USD 150

Domestic

Presenter Rp 3.500.000,-
Presenter (IEEE) Rp 3.000.000,-
Presenter (Student) Rp 2.500.000,-
Presenter (Student - IEEE) Rp 2.100.000,-
Non Presenter Rp 1.500.000,-

Registration Method

*Student presenters should upload their valid student ID. Recent graduates are eligible by providing proof of graduation date.

Methods of Payment

  • The available payment method is by Wire Transfer.
  • The conference committee must receive the full amount of the registration fee. Delegates should bear the Service Charge (if any) of the bank in the Sender’s Side. Please write your paper number on the remark column of the bank slip/transfer receipt.
  • The registration fee covers publication and proceeding.
  • An acknowledgement of your registration will be emailed to you, immediately after completion of online registration.
  • A Registration Confirmation will be provided after clearance of the full payment. Please note that wire transfer usually takes few days for processing.

Wire Transfer

Bank KB Bank
Account Number 1003299241
Account Name RPL 137 BLU POLTEK BTM UTK DK
Bank Address Jl. Sultan A Rahman No. 1 Komplek Sulaiman Blok A No. 7 & 8
Bank City Batam
SWIFT Code BBUKIDJA

items.title: IEEE No-Show Policy
items.summary: Please take note that IEEE has a strict policy on no-shows. Therefore, if your paper is accepted, one of the authors and their representatives MUST PRESENT their paper at the conference, either by appearing physically or online. Papers with no-show participants without a valid reason…
items.content_html:
Please take note that IEEE has a strict policy on no-shows. Therefore, if your paper is accepted, one of the authors and their representatives MUST PRESENT their paper at the conference, either by appearing physically or online.
Papers with no-show participants without a valid reason will not be submitted to IEEExplore. No refund of the paid fees may be claimed by the no-show author.
